score_range_label.en: Moderate-High (65.5) — Inflection Confirmed! Series High, +14pts Overnight
score_range_label.zh: 中高确信度 (65.5) — 拐点确认！系列新高，单日暴升 +14 分

position_advice.en: 65% (Added from 50% — TGA inflection confirmed, Hyperscaler earnings validated, breadth expanding)
position_advice.zh: 65%（从 50% 加仓——TGA 拐点确认，Hyperscaler 盈利验证，广度扩展）

summary.en: The inflection point has arrived. TGA dropped from $1.007T peak to $988.1B (-$19.1B WoW) — the seasonal unwind has begun. Net liquidity turned positive for the first time in 4 weeks (+$11B WoW). Bank reserves stabilized at $2.919T (+$4.6B WoW). Repo lending essentially zero ($1M). The liquidity trend has reversed: -$91B → -$215B → -$82B → +$11B. Three catalysts confirmed simultaneously: TGA inflection + Hyperscaler earnings validation + breadth expansion. This is the signal we were waiting for.
summary.zh: 拐点已到来。TGA 从 $1.007T 峰值降至 $988.1B（周环比 -$19.1B）——季节性回落已开始。净流动性四周来首次转正（周环比 +$11B）。银行准备金企稳回升至 $2.919T（+$4.6B）。Repo lending 实际归零（$1M）。流动性趋势已反转：-$91B → -$215B → -$82B → +$11B。三个催化剂同时确认：TGA 拐点 + Hyperscaler 盈利验证 + 广度扩展。这是我们等待的信号。

fed_balance_sheet_change.en: -$7.5B (WoW) — MBS accelerating runoff; Warsh 5/15 QT incoming
fed_balance_sheet_change.zh: -75 亿美元（周环比）——MBS 加速 runoff；Warsh 5/15 缩表即将到来

rrp_note.en: Month-end effect — normal ~$0.7B; elevated temporarily due to quarter-end positioning
rrp_note.zh: 月末效应——正常约 $0.7B；因季末定位暂时偏高

tga_note.en: -$19.1B WoW — INFLECTION CONFIRMED! Peak was $1.007T; seasonal unwind has begun; expect continued release over next 4-6 weeks
tga_note.zh: 周环比 -$19.1B——拐点确认！峰值为 $1.007T；季节性回落已开始；预计未来 4-6 周持续释放

net_liquidity_change.en: +$11B (WoW) — FIRST POSITIVE WEEK IN 4 WEEKS! Trend reversal: -$91B → -$215B → -$82B → +$11B
net_liquidity_change.zh: 周环比 +$110 亿——四周来首次正增长！趋势反转：-$91B → -$215B → -$82B → +$11B

details.en: The three-catalyst confirmation we were waiting for has arrived simultaneously. (1) TGA INFLECTION: TGA dropped from $1.007T peak to $988.1B — the seasonal post-tax-day unwind has begun. This is the single most important liquidity development. As TGA releases over the next 4-6 weeks, it injects cash directly into the banking system, expanding net liquidity. (2) HYPERSCALER VALIDATION: Alphabet net income +81% ($34.5B), Microsoft +29%, Amazon beat. AI generates real revenue — not just capex spending. (3) BREADTH EXPANSION: Russell 2000 +2.21% outperforming S&P +1.02% — small caps leading is a breadth thrust signal. Dow +1.62% also confirming. The remaining risks: Warsh 5/15 QT (MBS already accelerating runoff at -$12.2B/week), oil WTI $106 still elevated, 30Y at 4.987% approaching 5%, Meta beat-and-drop. But the primary trend has shifted from headwind to tailwind.
details.zh: 我们等待的三催化剂同时确认到来。(1) TGA 拐点：TGA 从 $1.007T 峰值降至 $988.1B——税日后季节性回落已开始。这是最重要的单一流动性发展。随着 TGA 在未来 4-6 周释放，它直接向银行系统注入现金，扩大净流动性。(2) Hyperscaler 验证：Alphabet 净利润 +81%（$345 亿），Microsoft +29%，Amazon beat。AI 产生真实收入——不只是 capex 支出。(3) 广度扩展：Russell 2000 +2.21% 跑赢 S&P +1.02%——小盘领涨是广度推力信号。Dow +1.62% 也在确认。剩余风险：Warsh 5/15 缩表（MBS 已加速 runoff，每周 -$12.2B）、油价 WTI $106 仍偏高、30Y 4.987% 接近 5%、Meta beat and drop。但主要趋势已从逆风转为顺风。

status.en: Tightening to Neutral — TGA Inflection Confirmed, Net Liquidity Positive
status.zh: 紧缩转中性——TGA 拐点确认，净流动性转正

reason.en: Score jumped from 42 to 55 (+13). The TGA inflection is the most important development: TGA dropped from $1.007T peak to $988.1B (-$19.1B WoW). Net liquidity turned positive for the first time in 4 weeks (+$11B). Bank reserves stabilized (+$4.6B). Repo lending at $1M (zero pressure). The liquidity trend has definitively reversed. Negative: Fed BS -$7.5B (MBS accelerating runoff at -$12.2B/week), Warsh 5/15 QT incoming. But the primary driver — TGA seasonal unwind — is now working in our favor for the next 4-6 weeks.
reason.zh: 分数从 42 跳升至 55（+13）。TGA 拐点是最重要的发展：TGA 从 $1.007T 峰值降至 $988.1B（周环比 -$19.1B）。净流动性四周来首次转正（+$11B）。银行准备金企稳（+$4.6B）。Repo lending $1M（零压力）。流动性趋势已决定性反转。负面因素：Fed BS -$7.5B（MBS 加速 runoff，每周 -$12.2B），Warsh 5/15 缩表即将到来。但主要驱动因素——TGA 季节性回落——现在在未来 4-6 周对我们有利。

status.en: Strong — Alphabet +81%, Microsoft +29%, Amazon Beat; AI Revenue Validated
status.zh: 强劲——Alphabet +81%，Microsoft +29%，Amazon Beat；AI 收入验证

reason.en: Score jumped from 72 to 80 (+8). Hyperscaler Blitz results are in: Alphabet net income +81% ($34.5B vs $19.1B expected), EPS $5.11 — stock +10% on 4/30. Microsoft revenue $54.5B +29%, cloud +35% — stock +7%. Amazon beat across all segments. Q1 GDP +2.0% Goldilocks (above 0% recession fear, below 3% overheating). Beat rate 84%, average beat magnitude 12.3% (2x long-term average). NTM EPS revised up 1.1%. Full-year consensus now 18% growth. The AI infrastructure thesis is validated — these companies are generating real revenue, not just spending on capex. Negative: Meta beat-and-drop (-5%), suggesting not all Mag 7 are equal. Tonight: Apple (final Hyperscaler test).
reason.zh: 分数从 72 跳升至 80（+8）。Hyperscaler Blitz 结果出炉：Alphabet 净利润 +81%（$345 亿 vs 预期 $191 亿），EPS $5.11——4/30 股价 +10%。Microsoft 收入 $545 亿 +29%，云业务 +35%——股价 +7%。Amazon 各板块全面 beat。Q1 GDP +2.0% Goldilocks（高于 0% 衰退担忧，低于 3% 过热）。Beat rate 84%，平均超幅 12.3%（长期均值两倍）。NTM EPS 上修 1.1%。全年增长共识升至 18%。AI 基础设施主题得到验证——这些公司在产生真实收入，而不只是 capex 支出。负面：Meta beat and drop（-5%），显示并非所有 Mag 7 都一样。今晚：Apple（最终 Hyperscaler 测试）。

status.en: Improving — Russell +2.21% Leads, Breadth Thrust Signal; Not Yet Above 60%
status.zh: 改善中——Russell +2.21% 领涨，广度推力信号；尚未突破 60%

reason.en: Score jumped from 42 to 58 (+16). Russell 2000 +2.21% outperforming S&P +1.02% is a breadth thrust signal — small caps leading means the rally is broadening beyond mega-cap tech. Dow +1.62% also confirming. April was S&P's best month in 6 years. But 200DMA breadth is still approximately 50-55%, not yet above the 60% threshold we use as confirmation. One day of small cap outperformance is encouraging but not definitive. Need to see breadth above 60% sustained for 3+ days to confirm structural improvement.
reason.zh: 分数从 42 跳升至 58（+16）。Russell 2000 +2.21% 跑赢 S&P +1.02% 是广度推力信号——小盘领涨意味着反弹正在扩展到大型科技股之外。Dow +1.62% 也在确认。4 月是 S&P 六年来最好月份。但 200 日均线广度仍约 50-55%，尚未突破我们用作确认的 60% 门槛。小盘股一天跑赢令人鼓舞但不是决定性的。需要看到广度在 60% 以上持续 3 天以上才能确认结构性改善。

status.en: Strongly Bullish — S&P 7,209 New ATH, VIX Crashes to 16.89, Global Synchronized Rally
status.zh: 强烈看涨——S&P 7,209 历史新高，VIX 暴跌至 16.89，全球同步上涨

reason.en: Score jumped from 55 to 78 (+23). S&P 500 closed at 7,209.01 — first close above 7,200, new all-time high. VIX crashed from 18.81 to 16.89 (-10.21%) — fear is leaving the market. 10Y yield declined (4.390% vs 4.418%), 5Y declined (4.023%). Global synchronized rally: Europe up, Asia up. April was S&P's best month in 6 years. Russell 2000 +2.21% breadth thrust. Dow +1.62% confirming. Pre-market 5/1 futures: S&P +0.14%, Dow +0.17%, Russell +0.21% — continuation. Negative: 30Y still at 4.987% (approaching 5%), oil WTI $105.82 still elevated, Meta -5% AH. But the primary price signal is unambiguously bullish.
reason.zh: 分数从 55 跳升至 78（+23）。S&P 500 收于 7,209.01——首次收于 7,200 上方，历史新高。VIX 从 18.81 暴跌至 16.89（-10.21%）——恐惧正在离开市场。10Y 收益率下降（4.390% vs 4.418%），5Y 下降（4.023%）。全球同步上涨：欧洲涨，亚洲涨。4 月是 S&P 六年来最好月份。Russell 2000 +2.21% 广度推力。Dow +1.62% 确认。5/1 盘前期货：S&P +0.14%，Dow +0.17%，Russell +0.21%——延续。负面：30Y 仍 4.987%（接近 5%），油价 WTI $105.82 仍偏高，Meta 盘后 -5%。但主要价格信号是明确看涨的。

trading_summary.en:
65.5 — Moderate-High. Inflection confirmed. Three catalysts arrived simultaneously:

(1) TGA INFLECTION: TGA dropped from $1.007T peak to $988.1B (-$19.1B). Net liquidity turned positive for the first time in 4 weeks. The seasonal unwind has begun — cash will flow back into the system over the next 4-6 weeks.

(2) HYPERSCALER VALIDATION: Alphabet +81% net income. Microsoft +29%. Amazon beat. AI generates real revenue. Q1 GDP +2.0% Goldilocks. This is not speculation — it's confirmed earnings.

(3) BREADTH EXPANSION: Russell +2.21% outperforming S&P +1.02%. Small caps leading. Dow +1.62% confirming. April was S&P's best month in 6 years.

This is not chasing — this is adding after confirmation. 65% position. Buy Alphabet, Microsoft, industrials, small caps. Don't touch Meta. Keep 35% cash for Warsh 5/15 policy clarity.

Next watch: Warsh 5/15 policy direction (most important medium-term risk), breadth above 60% sustained confirmation, oil below $100.
trading_summary.zh:
65.5 分，Moderate-High。拐点确认。三个催化剂同时到来：

(1) TGA 拐点：TGA 从 $1.007T 峰值降至 $988.1B（-$19.1B）。净流动性四周来首次转正。季节性回落已开始——现金将在未来 4-6 周流回系统。

(2) Hyperscaler 验证：Alphabet 净利润 +81%。Microsoft +29%。Amazon beat。AI 产生真实收入。Q1 GDP +2.0% Goldilocks。这不是投机——是已确认的盈利。

(3) 广度扩展：Russell +2.21% 跑赢 S&P +1.02%。小盘领涨。Dow +1.62% 确认。4 月是 S&P 六年来最好月份。

这不是追高——这是确认后加仓。65% 仓位。买 Alphabet、Microsoft、工业、小盘。不碰 Meta。保留 35% 现金等 Warsh 5/15 政策明朗化。

下一个观察点：Warsh 5/15 政策方向（最重要的中期风险），广度在 60% 以上持续确认，油价回落至 $100 以下。

trading_quote: Inflection confirmed. TGA releasing, AI revenue validated, breadth expanding. Add to 65%. Keep 35% cash for Warsh 5/15. This is the signal we waited for.

note.en: New all-time high — first close above 7,200; pre-market 5/1 futures +0.14%
note.zh: 历史新高——首次收于 7,200 上方；5/1 盘前期货 +0.14%

note.en: New ATH — Alphabet +10%, Microsoft +7%, Amazon +1.36% driving; pre-market +0.02%
note.zh: 历史新高——Alphabet +10%，Microsoft +7%，Amazon +1.36% 驱动；盘前 +0.02%

note.en: Confirming — Dow outperforming Nasdaq is breadth signal; pre-market +0.17%
note.zh: 确认——Dow 跑赢 Nasdaq 是广度信号；盘前 +0.17%

note.en: Leading — small caps outperforming is breadth thrust signal; pre-market +0.21%
note.zh: 领涨——小盘股跑赢是广度推力信号；盘前 +0.21%

note.en: Declining — yields falling as growth confirmed without overheating (Goldilocks GDP +2.0%)
note.zh: 下降——GDP +2.0% Goldilocks 确认增长但不过热，收益率下降

note.en: Declining — positive signal; 30Y 4.987% still approaching 5% (watch closely)
note.zh: 下降——正面信号；30Y 4.987% 仍接近 5%（密切关注）

note.en: Dollar stable — not adding pressure to emerging markets or commodities
note.zh: 美元稳定——未对新兴市场或大宗商品增加压力

note.en: Rising — safe haven demand + inflation hedge; Silver +1.19%, Copper +0.80% (risk-on confirmation)
note.zh: 上涨——避险需求 + 通胀对冲；白银 +1.19%，铜 +0.80%（风险偏好确认）

note.en: Still elevated — Hormuz risk premium; $100 is key level to watch for relief
note.zh: 仍偏高——Hormuz 风险溢价；$100 是关键观察水平

note.en: Above $110 — global inflation pressure; Brent $115 is critical threshold
note.zh: 突破 $110——全球通胀压力；Brent $115 是临界阈值

note.en: Slight recovery — still down 40% from $126K ATH; divergence from equity ATH persists
note.zh: 小幅回升——仍从 $126K 历史高点跌 40%；与股市历史新高的背离持续

note.en: Crashed — fear leaving market; below 17 is healthy; watch for sustained below 16
note.zh: 暴跌——恐惧正在离开市场；17 以下健康；关注是否持续在 16 以下

exchange_flow_detail.en: 52-week range: $60,074 – $126,198 | Down 40% from all-time high | Slight recovery but divergence from equity ATH persists
exchange_flow_detail.zh: 52 周区间：$60,074 – $126,198 | 从历史高点跌 40% | 小幅回升但与股市历史新高的背离持续

analysis.en: BTC $76,395 (+0.23%), slight recovery but still down 40% from $126,198 all-time high. Fear & Greed at 50 (neutral). The BTC-equity divergence remains the most notable unresolved risk signal. Historically, this type of divergence resolves with equities moving toward crypto (risk-off) rather than crypto catching up. However, if TGA liquidity injection over the next 4-6 weeks reaches risk assets broadly, BTC could recover toward $85,000-$90,000. Key support: $73,000-$75,000. Key resistance: $82,000-$85,000.
analysis.zh: BTC $76,395（+0.23%），小幅回升但仍从 $126,198 历史高点跌 40%。恐惧贪婪指数 50（中性）。BTC-股市背离仍是最显著的未解决风险信号。历史上，这种背离通常以股市向加密靠拢（风险规避）而非加密追赶股市来解决。但如果未来 4-6 周 TGA 流动性注入广泛到达风险资产，BTC 可能回升至 $85,000-$90,000。关键支撑：$73,000-$75,000。关键阻力：$82,000-$85,000。

analysis.en: Gold $4,644.70 (+0.33%), recovering from $4,571 recent low. Silver $74.91 (+1.19%) — gold/silver ratio ~62.0 (silver outperforming = risk-on signal). Copper $6.03 (+0.80%) also rising — industrial metals confirming growth. The gold bull case remains intact: TGA liquidity injection (inflationary), oil elevated (inflation hedge), geopolitical premium (Hormuz). With VIX declining and risk appetite improving, gold may consolidate near $4,600-$4,700 before the next leg higher.
analysis.zh: 黄金 $4,644.70（+0.33%），从近期低点 $4,571 回升。白银 $74.91（+1.19%）——金银比约 62.0（白银跑赢 = 风险偏好信号）。铜 $6.03（+0.80%）也在上涨——工业金属确认增长。黄金牛市逻辑仍然完整：TGA 流动性注入（通胀性）、油价偏高（通胀对冲）、地缘政治溢价（Hormuz）。随着 VIX 下降和风险偏好改善，黄金可能在 $4,600-$4,700 附近整理后再上一台阶。

title.en: Oil WTI $106 / Brent $112 + Warsh 5/15 QT — Two Remaining Major Risks
title.zh: 油价 WTI $106 / Brent $112 + Warsh 5/15 缩表——两个剩余主要风险

detail.en: Oil remains the biggest macro risk. WTI $105.82, Brent $111.66 — still elevated from Hormuz risk premium. At $115 Brent, stagflation risk becomes critical. Iran Hormuz situation unresolved. Warsh takes over 5/15 with confirmed plans for significant QT. MBS is already accelerating runoff (-$12.2B/week). If full QT is implemented, the liquidity formula deteriorates: TGA release (positive) vs Fed BS reduction (negative). Net effect unclear. Two weeks until clarity.
detail.zh: 油价仍是最大宏观风险。WTI $105.82，Brent $111.66——仍因 Hormuz 风险溢价偏高。Brent $115 时滞胀风险变得关键。伊朗 Hormuz 局势未解决。Warsh 5/15 接任，已确认大幅缩表计划。MBS 已加速 runoff（每周 -$12.2B）。如果全面缩表，流动性公式恶化：TGA 释放（正面）vs Fed BS 缩减（负面）。净效果不明确。两周内会明朗。

title.en: Meta Beat-and-Drop -5% + 30Y at 4.987% (1.3bps from 5%) — Divergence Not Resolved
title.zh: Meta Beat and Drop -5% + 30Y 4.987%（距 5% 仅 1.3bps）——背离未解决

detail.en: Meta beat revenue but missed user count, capex below expectations — stock -5% after-hours. Beat-and-drop has now spread to Mag 5, not just smaller names. The split between AI infrastructure winners (Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon) and everything else (Meta, consumer-facing) is widening. 30Y at 4.987% is 1.3bps from 5% — the first time since 2007. If 30Y breaks 5%, it triggers institutional rebalancing and is a major structural signal. The long end is not confirming the equity rally.
detail.zh: Meta 收入超预期但用户数 miss，capex 低于预期——盘后跌 5%。Beat and drop 已扩散到 Mag 5，不只是小型股。AI 基础设施赢家（Alphabet、Microsoft、Amazon）和其他所有（Meta、面向消费者）之间的分化在扩大。30Y 4.987% 距 5% 仅 1.3bps——2007 年以来首次。如果 30Y 突破 5%，触发机构再平衡，是重大结构性信号。长端未确认股市反弹。

title.en: Breadth Not Yet Confirmed Above 60% + BTC Down 40% — Structural Questions Remain
title.zh: 广度尚未确认突破 60% + BTC 跌 40%——结构性问题仍存

detail.en: Russell 2000 +2.21% leading is a positive breadth thrust, but 200DMA breadth is still approximately 50-55%, not yet above the 60% threshold. One day of small cap outperformance is encouraging but not definitive. Need 3+ consecutive days above 60% to confirm structural improvement. BTC down 40% from $126K ATH while equities at ATH remains the most notable unresolved divergence. Historically, this type of divergence resolves with equities moving toward crypto (risk-off) rather than crypto catching up to equities.
detail.zh: Russell 2000 +2.21% 领涨是正面广度推力，但 200 日均线广度仍约 50-55%，尚未突破 60% 门槛。小盘股一天跑赢令人鼓舞但不是决定性的。需要连续 3 天以上在 60% 以上才能确认结构性改善。BTC 从 $126K 历史高点跌 40% 而股市在历史新高，仍是最显著的未解决背离。历史上，这种背离通常以股市向加密靠拢（风险规避）而非加密追赶股市来解决。

title.en: Active but Improving. BTC -40% vs Equity ATH Remains. Meta Beat-and-Drop. 30Y Near 5%.
title.zh: 活跃但改善中。BTC 跌 40% vs 股市历史新高仍存。Meta Beat and Drop。30Y 接近 5%。

detail.en: Divergences are improving but not fully resolved. Positive: VIX crashed (-10.21%), Russell outperforming (breadth thrust), Dow confirming, 10Y/5Y yields declining, global synchronized rally. Remaining divergences: (1) BTC -40% from ATH while equities at ATH — biggest unresolved risk-off signal. (2) Meta beat-and-drop — not all Mag 7 are equal. (3) 30Y at 4.987% approaching 5% — bond market not fully confirming equity rally. (4) Breadth at 50-55%, not yet above 60% threshold. The balance has shifted from mostly negative to mixed-positive, but the BTC divergence in particular deserves continued monitoring.
detail.zh: 背离在改善但未完全解决。正面：VIX 暴跌（-10.21%），Russell 跑赢（广度推力），Dow 确认，10Y/5Y 收益率下降，全球同步上涨。剩余背离：(1) 股市历史新高时 BTC 跌 40%——最大未解决风险规避信号。(2) Meta beat and drop——并非所有 Mag 7 都一样。(3) 30Y 4.987% 接近 5%——债市未完全确认股市反弹。(4) 广度 50-55%，尚未突破 60% 门槛。平衡已从主要负面转为混合偏正面，但 BTC 背离特别值得持续监控。
